name: flightplan-mcp
description: Token runway awareness for AI coding sessions. A goose knows how far it can fly. 🪿
author: Andrew Hannah

engines._note: Why <23.0.0: better-sqlite3 and sqlite-vec publish pre-built binaries for Node 18-22 only. Node 23+ requires compiling native modules from source, which fails without specific C++20 toolchain setup. This engine range is enforced at install time (npm warns) and at runtime (src/index.ts hard-exits with a clear message). See .nvmrc for the recommended version (Node 20 LTS).
